div.h1: Canary app is required but missing.
div.p: To run this app, you need to first install the Canary app. This app is available on Splunkbase and from the Sideview website. It runs on both Splunk Enterprise and Splunk Cloud, and can be installed using Splunk's in-product app install.
HOWEVER, if you missed that critical part, you may have missed some other details:

ol.li: You will also need to have our "TA_cube" app installed on your Forwarder/Indexer tier (see README and/or docs for more details)
This app has setup documentation on our website.

Although you can use this app and the TA to just handle your ingestion and field extractions, the far cooler way to use it, is to also set up Sideview's main app Cisco CDR Reporting and Analytics, whose full setup documentation is here.

div.p: Unfortunately your version of Splunk appears to be prior to version 7.0 and the Canary will not run on these systems.

Especially if you're a current customer of Splunk, it is absolutely possible to upgrade Splunk to a more recent version. If you've been holding off because of particular concerns, reach out to us (or to Splunk) and it's likely we can help.

In the meantime here are some great docs for what particular upgrade paths that can get old releases all the way to the latest-and-greatest: https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/Splunk/latest/Installation/HowtoupgradeSplunk
